title: hieracium sparsum subsp. nigrovirenticeps
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. nigrovirenticeps, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hieracium sparsum subsp. nigrovirenticeps are typically used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties. However, further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of Hieracium sparsum subsp. nigrovirenticeps for medicinal use.
